title: Peer-to-peer (P2P) lending: default, default dependency and industry potential
search_query: Peer-to-peer (P2P) lending: default, default dependency and industry potential
notes: The thesis presents three empirical chapters on the credit risk and industry potential of the Peer-to-Peer (P2P) market. The first empirical chapter explores default risk which considers macroeconomic factors in addition to traditional determinants such as credit scores, loan-to-...
